SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NGOC ANN THI CAO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA. WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF JULIE LEE (PROPERTY OWNER). PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS ZESHENG LIAO, THE PLUMBING CONTRACTOR HIRED BY PROPERTY OWNER WHO WAS ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BENNY YEE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY ASST CHIEF OF CLAIMS. WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY SFPUC PLUMBER, DON MARTIN. DEFENDANT MITCHELL ENGINEERING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANDREW NOLL AND KATHLEEN STEBLOW CORP SECRETARY. DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPING WAS DISMISSED FROM THIS CASE AT THE LAST HEARING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAO, NGOC ANN THI DBA MARYANNE HAIRSTYLING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO` BAUMAN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION INC. MITCHELL ENGINEERING $4,990.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,990.00, SEE ENCLOSED ATTACHMENT: STATEMENT OF DECISION. BAUMN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. MITCHELL ENGINEERING IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Set For Trial On Sep-03-20 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Continued To Sep-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tom Lakritz for City and County of San Francisco Appellant/ Defendant;
Ngoc Ann Thi Cao Respondent/ Plaintiff in pro per and is assisted by vietnamese interpreter Linh T. Musfelt #300210 Oath on file.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Witnesses appearing via zoom.

Tom Lakritz Appellant/Defendant testifies on behalf of The City and County of San Francisco. The following documentary evidence is introduce:

Exhibit A - 01/24/2019 Daily inspection report with photos of pipes and water heater (3 pgs.);

Ngoc Ann Thi Cao Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. Julie Yang Lee testisfies on behalf of Ngoc Ann Thi Cao. No documentary evidence is introduce.

At the conclusion of the hearing, The Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D608).
